title: Loli Eva
wikitext:
[]: Post by AchtungAffen » Sun Feb 04, 2007 2:44 pm I would almost bet one of the new characters will be Touji's little sister.

[]: Post by Reichu » Sun Feb 04, 2007 2:50 pm AchtungAffen wrote: I would almost bet one of the new characters will be Touji's little sister.

[]: Post by Shawn Dudley » Sun Feb 04, 2007 10:16 pm The new character will almost certainly be a pilot, however... GAINAX keeps talking about "Eight Children", are we to see Eight pilots in the new movies? Speculation, anyone?

[]: Post by Gendo'sPapa » Sun Feb 04, 2007 10:53 pm Eight Children? Where was that? I remember there some like EVA toy ads or something that spoke of 1/8 but I vaguely remember Pen-Pen was like 3/8. So unless Pen-Pen is going to be an EVA pilot I'm not too sure. And you know (I might get crucifed for this) I actually wouldn't mind if they got rid of Pen-Pen. He's cute but thats about it. He really stood out as a distraction for me when he shows up in End of Evangelion before Shinji chokes Asuka. It's like: "Wow...this is kinda deep and really introspective of the director too....that's a funny penguin....where was I? Oh yeah, he's grasping for that one last shred of help from the one person who....that penguin looks shocked....Penguin,Penguin.

[]: Post by Reichu » Sun Feb 04, 2007 11:21 pm Shawn Dudley wrote: The new character will almost certainly be a pilot

[]: Post by Sailor Star Dust » Mon Feb 05, 2007 3:26 pm Um, are you taking about THIS? http://www.evastore.jp/ <--Refresh to see them all: Shinji, Asuka, Rei, Hikari, Toji, Kensuke, Kaworu... No idea who the "eight" is. Must be Pen-pen as the "new character", He becomes an Eva Pilot! :P "WARK!" "Sugoi...Pengoki ga shito o kata wa!"

[]: Post by AchtungAffen » Wed Feb 07, 2007 6:38 pm If Gainax is the Gainax I know, then there has to be more loli on Eva. It doesn't have loli enough. The girls look mature enough for the likes of Yamaga. Some grade school loli on loli action has the Gainax seal of approval. That's why Touji's sister.

[]: Post by Hunter21 » Thu Feb 08, 2007 3:52 pm Sadly you have a point there AchtungAffen.

[]: Post by Shawn Dudley » Thu Feb 08, 2007 4:24 pm If Gainax is the Gainax I know, then there has to be more loli on Eva. It doesn't have loli enough. The girls look mature enough for the likes of Yamaga. Some grade school loli on loli action has the Gainax seal of approval. That's why Touji's sister.

[]: Post by Mr. Tines » Thu Feb 08, 2007 5:39 pm Digression split from the new Manga Stage thread... I wouldn't call the main girls in Jinki:Extend loli myself -- they looked well into their teens -- and the minor Japan-side characters were just that: side-characters. And the fanservice was minimal. The one-shot Sky Girls OVA last autumn came much closer to being loli-Eva (DFC fanservice laid on with a trowel).

[]: Post by NAveryW » Thu Feb 08, 2007 5:44 pm There's really no evidence that there will be any lolicon material in Rebuild. This is supposed to once again go against the industry standards, so if there is anything lolicon-type, it will probably be subverted. Even within Eva itself, Rei was considered a sex symbol, and look how that was subverted in EoE.

[]: Post by Gendo'sPapa » Thu Feb 08, 2007 5:52 pm Ah man, I'd be scared to see what Anno would do with a subversion of the pervesness that is lolicon. It'd be like an anime Lolita.

[]: Post by Millions Livio » Fri Feb 09, 2007 2:04 pm "Rebuild of Evangelion: The Rape of the loli's" That's going against the industry standar-- nevermind..

[]: Post by AchtungAffen » Fri Feb 09, 2007 3:19 pm I'm not so sure, but I believe that today's industry standards don't include stuff like Kyou no 5 no 2. And that's sum loli action. I still wonder how much anti-industry Gainax was with Diebuster... cuz, well... hmm... They say history rhymes. But well, if they have KOTOKO songs, then all's right with my Eva.

[]: Post by felineki » Fri Feb 09, 2007 3:26 pm I was hoping this topic would be about loli Evangelions.

[]: Post by Mr. Tines » Fri Feb 09, 2007 7:21 pm I'm sure Reichu will oblige.

[]: Post by Hunter21 » Sat Feb 10, 2007 8:24 am Considering Anno has turned into a perverted old man (Look at some of his most recent productions as proof) maybe he will oblige too. I can easily see him treading onto the loli stage along with making the latest installment of Eva heavy on the fanservice. He probably just wants to make the movies so he can put nipples back on all the girls like in EOE.

[]: Post by Reichu » Sun Feb 11, 2007 4:15 am felineki wrote: I was hoping this topic would be about loli Evangelions.

[]: Post by cat42 » Sun Feb 11, 2007 4:28 am Reichu wrote: ***stuff***

[]: Post by Reichu » Sun Feb 11, 2007 5:16 am cat42 wrote: :oops:
